cards.title: Big Design Up Front
cards.content: paradigm where the entire design is done upfront

cards.title: antifragility
cards.content:
- *how much something goes **stronger** due to time passed, mishaps, attacks*

![](../media/img/how-to-build-software/hydra.webp)

cards.title: Command Query Separation
cards.content:
- **means**:
	- do not have getters that also set something
	- do not have setters that also get something

![](../media/img/how-to-build-software/cq.webp)
